items.title: Modules & Imports
items.description: CLIs are usually wired under an if __name__ == '__main__' guard so the module is both importable and runnable.

items.title: os & pathlib
items.description: Parsed path arguments are typically turned into Path objects, and defaults can come from os.environ.

items.title: Functions & Scope
items.description: A main() function holds the parser setup, keeping argument handling out of module-level code.
